productDisplayName: Puma Men Whirlwind Classic Green Casual Shoes
description: An instant hit in the 1980s, the puma Whirlwind Classic running shoe comes in a sleek design for absolute comfort and style. UpperNylon and suede upper for durability, breathability, comfort and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised Fitpuma wraparound formstripe for enhanced shoe structure and styleTextile padded tongue and collar for in-step comfortCushioned fabric lined footbed for all-day comfort and impact protectionMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleAggressive rounded lug rubber outsole, with the outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard and heel guard
